pets.name: Mochi
pets.personality: 温顺且超级贪吃，喜欢在我手心睡觉。
pets.personalityEn: Gentle and very greedy, loves sleeping in my palm.
pets.story: Mochi是我在东京宠物展第一眼相中的小家伙。从刚出生只有几克重，到现在能稳稳吸附在窗台，它见证了我每一个熬夜做设计的夜晚。
pets.storyEn: Mochi is the little guy I picked at the Tokyo Pet Show. From just a few grams to now firmly holding on the window sill, she witnessed all my late-night design work.

timeline.title: 初次见面
timeline.desc: 坐着JR线把它带回了家，只有3克重，小小的像颗花生。
timeline.descEn: Brought her home via JR line. Only 3g, tiny like a peanut.

timeline.title: 第一次主动爬手
timeline.desc: 在勺喂果泥时，它的小爪子搭在了我的拇指上，冰冰凉凉的。
timeline.descEn: While spoon-feeding diet, her little claw stepped on my thumb. Cool and soft.

timeline.title: 一岁生日
timeline.desc: 做了一个水果果泥小蛋糕，一口气全吃光了！
timeline.descEn: Made a tiny fruit diet cake, she ate the whole thing in one go!

pets.name: Zuzu
pets.personality: 傲娇且警戒心强，但晒太阳时会变成明艳的黄色。
pets.personalityEn: Proud and alert, but turns vibrant yellow when sunbathing.
pets.story: Zuzu是在圣保罗的爬友聚会上交换来的。它在我的阳台植物角拥有一个专属的高空森林，看着它缓慢移动就像在欣赏慢动作电影。
pets.storyEn: Traded Zuzu at a Sao Paulo reptile meet. He has his own high forest in my balcony garden. Watching him move is like enjoying a slow-motion movie.

timeline.title: 定居森林缸
timeline.desc: 住进了定制的1.2米网箱，一直盯着滴水器看。
timeline.descEn: Moved into a custom 1.2m mesh enclosure, kept staring at the dripper.

timeline.title: 蜕皮警报
timeline.desc: 身上披了一层白纱，通过加湿和多晒太阳顺利蜕下。
timeline.descEn: Wrapped in white shed like a veil. Shed successfully after misting & sunbathing.

posts.content: Mochi 今天第一次主动爬上我的手！勺喂了它最喜欢的无花果味果泥，舔得干干净净。手心上那种凉丝丝、软绵绵的小爪子触感，简直太治愈了！
posts.contentEn: Mochi climbed onto my hand voluntarily for the first time today! Spoon-fed her favorite fig diet, and she licked it clean. The cool, soft touch of her claws on my palm is pure therapy!

commentsList.name: Anna (Germany)
commentsList.text: Congrats! My crested gecko still runs away when I open the enclosure. Any tips?

commentsList.name: 陈叔爬爬 (China)
commentsList.text: 好品相的莉莉白！喂食多一些耐心，经常把手放箱子里脱敏就会好很多。

commentsList.name: ReptileLover99 (USA)
commentsList.text: So precious! Mochi is living her best life 🦎

posts.content: 享受热带阳光的 Zuzu。今天圣保罗是个大晴天，带它在阳台灌木丛上晒了20分钟太阳，体色瞬间从暗绿转化成了极其明亮斑斓的黄色！真是一只行走的自然调色盘。
posts.contentEn: Zuzu enjoying tropical sun. Sunny day in Sao Paulo today. Let him bask in the balcony bushes for 20 mins, and his skin color shifted from dark green to bright yellow instantly! A walking natural palette.

commentsList.name: Lucas (USA)
commentsList.text: Beautiful setup Carlos! Sunlight is the best UV for chameleons.

commentsList.name: 爬虫小助手 (China)
commentsList.text: 变色龙的颜色变化太神奇了！请问湿度控制在多少？

posts.content: 这是我和蓝舌石龙子共同生活的第100天！从小拇指大的小家伙长到如今手臂这么长。每天看它探索垫木、慢悠悠地爬行，这种安静的陪伴感无可替代。有人知道悉尼哪里有靠谱的异宠体检医院吗？
posts.contentEn: 100 days together with my blue tongue skink! From finger-sized to arm-length. Watching it slowly crawl and explore is irreplaceable calm. Anyone knows a reliable exotic vet in Sydney?

commentsList.name: AussieKeeper
commentsList.text: Try the Exotic Vet clinic in Waterloo, they specialize in reptiles and birds!

commentsList.name: BlueyFan (Australia)
commentsList.text: The growth is amazing! What substrate are you using?

posts.content: 花了三个月打造的热带雨林生态缸终于完成了！植物已经完全扎根，小瀑布流水声超治愈。准备把我的睫角守宫搬进去，给它一个真正的小森林🌿
posts.contentEn: My 3-month tropical rainforest vivarium project is finally done! Plants are fully rooted, the little waterfall sound is so soothing. Ready to move my crested gecko into a real tiny forest 🌿

commentsList.name: PlantDad (UK)
commentsList.text: This is absolutely STUNNING! What plants did you use?

commentsList.name: 生态缸达人 (China)
commentsList.text: 太美了！这个瀑布是用什么泵做的？求教程！

commentsList.name: Kenji_T (Japan)
commentsList.text: This is goals! Mochi would love this setup.

posts.content: 我家球蟒 Noodle 今天终于完成了蜕皮！完整的一条蛇蜕，超有成就感。这次用了加湿盒效果很好，蜕皮特别顺利，推荐给所有蛇友们 🐍
posts.contentEn: My ball python Noodle finally completed shedding today! A perfect full shed, so satisfying. The humidity box worked great this time, super smooth shed. Highly recommend to all snake keepers 🐍

commentsList.name: SnakeWhisperer (Canada)
commentsList.text: Perfect shed! What's your humidity setup like?

commentsList.name: 小蛇酱 (China)
commentsList.text: Pastel基因太好看了！这个配色绝了

commentsList.name: Carlos_S (Brazil)
commentsList.text: Noodle is gorgeous! Love the morph colors.

posts.content: 曼谷的乍都乍周末市场又来了好多新品种的豹纹守宫！入手了一只超漂亮的暴风雪基因，眼睛是纯黑的，颜色是纯净的白色，太梦幻了！这个周末准备给它布置新家 🏠
posts.contentEn: So many new leopard gecko morphs at Bangkok's Chatuchak weekend market! Got a stunning Blizzard morph with pure black eyes and white body. So dreamy! Planning the new enclosure setup this weekend 🏠

commentsList.name: GeckoKing (Thailand)
commentsList.text: Chatuchak is heaven for gecko lovers! Great find!

commentsList.name: 守宫少女 (China)
commentsList.text: 暴风雪基因的纯黑眼太好看了，求价格！

commentsList.name: Hans_Berlin (Germany)
commentsList.text: Leopard geckos are the best beginner reptiles. Beautiful morph!

posts.content: 分享一下我的墨西哥红膝蜘蛛 Rosie 🕷️ 很多人怕蜘蛛，但红膝其实性格超级温柔！从来不咬人，喜欢慢悠悠地散步。养了两年，每次蜕皮后的新外壳颜色都更加鲜艳。打破偏见，节肢动物也可以很可爱！
posts.contentEn: Meet my Mexican red knee tarantula Rosie 🕷️ Many fear spiders, but red knees are super gentle! Never bites, loves slow walks. After 2 years, each molt makes her colors more vibrant. Breaking stereotypes - arthropods can be adorable!

commentsList.name: SpiderFan (USA)
commentsList.text: Red knees are the gateway species to arachnid keeping! Love Rosie!

commentsList.name: 节肢控 (China)
commentsList.text: 红膝真的是最适合新手的捕鸟蛛了，颜值又高！

posts.content: 我家的角蛙 Gordo 今天又把自己埋进了椰土里，只露出两只大眼睛瞪着我看 😂 这个小胖子每次看到我拿镊子就知道要开饭了，整个身体都在抖，太搞笑了！角蛙真的是最有表情包潜力的宠物！
posts.contentEn: My Pacman frog Gordo buried himself in coconut fiber again, just two big eyes staring at me 😂 This chonky boy vibrates his whole body when he sees the feeding tongs. Pacman frogs are the ultimate meme pets!

commentsList.name: FrogLife (Mexico)
commentsList.text: Gordo es hermoso! Pacman frogs are just living blobs of happiness 🐸

commentsList.name: 角蛙萌新 (China)
commentsList.text: 哈哈哈只露两只眼睛的样子太可爱了！求日常视频！

commentsList.name: Jessica_LA (USA)
commentsList.text: The way they just SIT there and stare 😂 I love them

posts.content: 鬃狮蜥 Tteok 的沙漠造景终于搞定了！用了天然岩石搭了晒台，底材选的挖掘专用土加沙石混合。温度梯度从晒点42°C到冷区25°C，UVB用的是T5灯管。分享给同样在养鬃狮的朋友们参考！🦎☀️
posts.contentEn: Finally finished the desert scape for my bearded dragon Tteok! Natural rock basking spot, excavator clay + sand substrate mix. Temp gradient from 42°C basking to 25°C cool side, T5 UVB tube. Sharing for fellow beardie keepers! 🦎☀️

commentsList.name: BeardieKing (Australia)
commentsList.text: Perfect temperature gradient! T5 is the way to go for beardies.

commentsList.name: 鬃狮爱好者 (China)
commentsList.text: 温度梯度做得很专业！请问UVB灯管用的什么品牌？

commentsList.name: Emma_London (UK)
commentsList.text: Tteok looks so happy! That basking setup is chef's kiss 🤌

posts.content: 多伦多的冬天对养爬虫来说真的是考验！分享一下我的加温方案：陶瓷加热灯+温控器+保温棉包裹箱体侧面。即使室外零下20°C，箱内也能稳定在26°C。北方的爬友们一定要注意冬季保温！❄️🔥
posts.contentEn: Toronto winters are a real challenge for reptile keepers! My heating setup: ceramic heat emitter + thermostat + insulation wrap on enclosure sides. Even at -20°C outside, enclosure stays at 26°C. Northern keepers, winter insulation is a must! ❄️🔥

commentsList.name: Hans_Berlin (Germany)
commentsList.text: Same struggle in Berlin! Ceramic heaters are lifesavers.

commentsList.name: 北方爬友 (China)
commentsList.text: 东北的冬天也是这样！保温棉真的很重要

posts.content: 上海爬宠展带回来的战利品！入手了一只超级漂亮的橘色睫角守宫，火焰基因，背上的花纹像是大自然画上去的油画🎨 还买了一套全新的造景材料，周末准备大改造！这次展会人超多，异宠圈真的越来越热了！
posts.contentEn: Haul from Shanghai Reptile Expo! Got a gorgeous orange crested gecko, flame morph with patterns like nature's own oil painting 🎨 Also picked up new scape materials for a weekend enclosure makeover. The expo was packed - exotic pet community is really growing!

commentsList.name: Kenji_T (Japan)
commentsList.text: Fire morphs are my favorite! The patterns are incredible.

commentsList.name: 守宫繁殖家 (China)
commentsList.text: 火焰基因的品相真好！请问哪个展商那入的？

commentsList.name: Somchai_BKK (Thailand)
commentsList.text: China's reptile expos are getting huge! Would love to visit someday.

posts.content: 大阪的爬虫カフェ（爬虫咖啡馆）新开了一家！可以一边喝抹茶拿铁一边摸豹纹守宫和球蟒，太幸福了！店里的小哥还教我正确的抱蛇姿势，第一次上手球蟒完全不害怕，它的鳞片滑滑的超舒服 🍵🐍
posts.contentEn: New reptile cafe opened in Osaka! Sipping matcha latte while handling leopard geckos and ball pythons - pure bliss! The staff taught me how to hold a snake properly. First time holding a ball python and it was so smooth and chill 🍵🐍

commentsList.name: MinJi_Seoul (Korea)
commentsList.text: Japan reptile cafes are amazing! We need more in Seoul!

commentsList.name: 爬虫咖啡控 (China)
commentsList.text: 天哪好想去！请问店名叫什么？下次去大阪必打卡！

hotTopics.titleEn: Show off your exotic pet's weirdest sleeping positions

hotTopics.titleEn: What plants are you growing in your bioactive vivarium?

hotTopics.titleEn: Global heating & temperature control tips in winter

hotTopics.titleEn: What should be your first exotic pet as a beginner?
